stmt: ∀ {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V] [Module ℂ V] (bc : BosonCore V) (n : ℕ), bc.number * bc.aDagger ^ n - bc.aDagger ^ n * bc.number = (n : ℂ) • bc.aDagger ^ n
priority_rationale: Core commutator identity linking number and creation powers; broadly reusable.

stmt: ∀ {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V] [Module ℂ V] (bc : BosonCore V) (n : ℕ), bc.number * bc.a ^ n - bc.a ^ n * bc.number = (- (n : ℂ)) • bc.a ^ n
priority_rationale: Core commutator identity for annihilation powers; likely unlocks many operator arguments.

stmt: ∀ {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V] [Module ℂ V] (bc : BosonCore V), bc.vacuum ≠ 0 → LinearIndependent ℂ (fun n : ℕ => bc.ket n)
priority_rationale: Strong structural statement about the ket family with wide reuse across the theory.

stmt: ∀ {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V] [Module ℂ V] (bc : BosonCore V) {v : V} {μ : ℂ} (n : ℕ), bc.number v = μ • v → bc.number ((bc.aDagger ^ n) v) = (μ + (n : ℂ)) • ((bc.aDagger ^ n) v)
priority_rationale: Useful eigenvalue-shift consequence, but mostly downstream of the commutator theorem.
